# Issue #21: Main dashboard layout (3-panel design)

## Description
Create the main Streamlit dashboard with 3-panel layout.

## Tasks
- [ ] Create left panel for inventory
- [ ] Create center panel for orders
- [ ] Create right panel for actions
- [ ] Add bottom event log ticker
- [ ] Add header with day counter and user info
- [ ] Implement manual refresh button

## Acceptance Criteria
- Layout matches wireframe in PRD
- All panels visible and responsive
- Clear visual hierarchy

## Phase
Phase 4 - Dashboard UI
